_comment: Recorded football-data.org v4 poll snapshots for the offline goal-news proof. Snapshot 0 is the match at 0-0 (baseline, no fire). Snapshot 1 is the same match after a France goal (fires exactly one GOAL event). The goals[] array is the optional scorer enrichment football-data exposes on the match-detail payload. No real broadcast media is referenced; visuals resolve to Commons stills only.
